block_02: vaastvik market ka dvaar ab aapke lie khula hai! Jab bhi aap taiyaar hon, nivesh karna shuru karen.
block_03: Aapko aage badhane mein madad karne ke liye, ham ek saral lekin bahut upayogi trend treding rananeeti saajha kar rahe hain ⬇
block_09: Binary/digital options, Forex, stocks, crypto, ETF, commoditiy
block_12: Moving average ka upayog traderon ko pichhli price action ka upayog karke ek trend ki pushti karne mein madad karne ke liye kiya jaata hai. Do prakar ke Moving average hote hain: simple moving average (SMA) aur exponential moving average (EMA).
block_13: SMA aamtaur par market ke band bhaav par nirbhar karata hai, jo ise pratikriya karne mein dheema bana sakta hai. Is kaaran se, trader lambi avadhi ke anubandh ke liye SMA ka upayog karte hain.
block_14: EMA bhi pichhle price data par nirbhar karta hai lekin adhik maan un keematon ko diya jaata hai jo haal ke hain. Yah EMA ko binary aur digital option ke traderon ke lie adhik praasangik banaata hai.
block_16: Jab chart upar se red candlesticks ke saath sanketak ko par karta hai, to iska matalab hai ki asset ki keemat girati hai aur yah giraavat jaari rah sakti hai. Yeh SELL karne ka sanket hota hai.
block_17: Jab green candlesticks neeche se sanketak ki rekha ko paar karte hain, to yah trend reversal ka sanket hai aur yah BUY karne ka sanket hai.
